Description: Defines a reusable Custom Schedule Board instance.
Stores a versioned configuration set for a Schedule Board.
Defines a configurable runtime view for a Schedule Board.
Defines a schedulable resource type and its scheduling behaviour.
Defines a schedulable event type and its board behaviour.
Defines a grouping and hierarchy scheme used by a Schedule Board.
Defines a configurable business status, label and presentation behaviour.
Defines permitted transitions between scheduling statuses.
Defines a configurable scheduling validation or enforcement rule.
Represents a native schedulable resource such as a worker, vehicle, room or equipment item.
Represents a native booking or service parent record.
Defines a reusable operating calendar.
Defines a recurring operating-hours rule for a Calendar.
Defines a date-specific override, closure or exceptional operating period for a Calendar.
Stores public holiday reference data used by calendars and scheduling overlays.
Represents a concrete scheduled shift for a resource.
Represents an explicit availability, block or non-working interval for a resource.
Represents a time-bound resource unavailability record. No sensitive leave reason is included in the base schema.
Represents a materialised node in a configured resource grouping hierarchy.
Represents a resource membership in one resolved group hierarchy path.
Represents a logical Draft, Published, Superseded or Rolled Back schedule version.
Represents a canonical scheduled booking, activity, task or service component.
Represents required role, quantity, capacity or resource demand for a Schedule Item.
Represents a resource allocation to a Schedule Item or Schedule Requirement.
Stores scheduling conflict evidence such as overlap, leave, capacity or rule violations.
Represents immutable publish and rollback snapshot evidence.
